log: REASONING: Throwing rock at Fairy — Winged Striker (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:19+9=28 vs AC 14] HIT! 26 damage. Fairy — Winged Striker HP: 41/67
REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:10+3=13 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:19+-2=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:14+-2=12 vs DC 16] FAIL!
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Fairy — Winged Striker.
--- Frost Giant --- HP: 138/138 | AC: 15 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
--- Fairy — Winged Striker --- HP: 41/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: Concentrating on Hypnotic Pattern. Vicious Mockery on Ogre (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Ogre.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:20+-2=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Fairy — Winged Striker.
→ Javelin: [d20:16+6=22 vs AC 14] HIT! 13 damage. Fairy — Winged Striker HP: 28/67

--- Fairy — Winged Striker --- HP: 28/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern

REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Fairy — Winged Striker.
→ Javelin: [d20:20+6=26 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 19 damage. Fairy — Winged Striker HP: 9/67
--- Frost Giant --- HP: 138/138 | AC: 15 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
--- Fairy — Winged Striker --- HP: 9/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (9/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Fairy — Winged Striker is affected by Greater Invisibility.
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Fairy — Winged Striker.
→ Javelin: [d20:11+6=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 10 damage. Fairy — Winged Striker HP: -1/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Greater Invisibility ends!
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Fairy — Winged Striker.
